reasoning: Grok 4 launched in July 2025 and did not reach the #1 spot on LMSYS Chatbot Arena, peaking around #3 or #4 behind OpenAI's o3 and Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro. For xAI to have the top model by December 31, 2025, they would need to launch Grok 5 and have it immediately claim the undisputed #1 spot (xAI loses all ties alphabetically). While Elon Musk suggested an end-of-year target for Grok 5, his timelines are frequently optimistic, with other rumors expecting a 2026 release. Even if released on time, Grok 5 would have to outperform upcoming iterations from Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The market estimated 7% in mid-October, and accounting for the narrowing time window, 5% is defensively calibrated.
